programme.title: Stepping Into Love
programme.desc: Claire has the difficult task to help a maverick artist exhibit a success. In the short time she spends with Devan, the developer their feelings grow but will their story lead to a happy ending?

programme.title: Diagnosis Delicious
programme.desc: (2016) Romance with Maya Stojan. A fallen chef and a talented cardiologist who hates cooking cross paths in a cooking class-serving up a lesson in love neither saw coming.

programme.title: One Perfect Match
programme.desc: (2023) Charming romcom with Merritt Patterson and Joshua Sasse. Love gets complicated for Seattle's top matchmaker when sparks fly with a mystery man, who turns out to be her new client...

programme.title: A Lifelong Love
programme.desc: (2023) Lyrical love story starring Andrea Brooks and Patch May. When poet Annika tries to reunite her grandfather with his first love, will teaming up with an old flame rekindle another romance?

programme.title: The Baker's Son
programme.desc: The locals of Windwards Island always knows when talented baker Matt has fallen in love, his loaves taste delicious. So, when his bread stops tasting bland, is it due to the newcomer or friend Annie?

programme.title: Baking up Love
programme.desc: A confectionery store owner Lynn is convinced by the people of her town to enter the Great Pumpkin Bake Off. With the arrival of her unruly niece Julie, has she beaten of more than she can chew? (2021

programme.title: Baked With A Kiss
programme.desc: (2022) Culinary romance starring Jonathan Stoddard and Ansley Gordon. Renowned for her magical True Love pie, a baker accidentally serves one to a rude customer, who ends up falling in love with her.

programme.title: Two Chefs and A Wedding Cake
programme.desc: (2022) Foodie fun romance. Sparks fly for a food critic at her sister's wedding when she clashes with a chef infamous for banning reviewers from his restaurant. Can they turn rivalry into romance?

programme.title: The Way To The Heart
programme.desc: (2022) Romance with Meghan Heffern. When a big-city chef loses her spark, her boss insists she takes a break to find herself again. Will a visit to her hometown help her rediscover her passions?

programme.title: A Royal Recipe for Love
programme.desc: (2023) Flavourful romance starring Laura Miyata and David Lafontaine. An NYC baker would love to land a cookbook deal. Will a dash of royalty and a spoonful of romance help fulfil her dream?

programme.title: Love, Romance and Chocolate
programme.desc: Emma and chocolatier Luc compete for Belgium's Royal Chocolatier. The beauty and romance of Bruges inspire unique chocolate combinations, but will their entry win without them losing their hearts?

programme.title: With Love, Your Sweetly Salted
programme.desc: (2023) Anonymous food critic Alison goes undercover as a prep cook to make amends with the chef she accidentally trashed online, but things soon begin to heat up in the kitchen.

programme.title: The Baker's Son
programme.desc: The locals of Windwards Island always knows when talented baker Matt has fallen in love, his loaves taste delicious. So, when his bread stops tasting bland, is it due to the newcomer or friend Annie?

programme.title: Baking up Love
programme.desc: A confectionery store owner Lynn is convinced by the people of her town to enter the Great Pumpkin Bake Off. With the arrival of her unruly niece Julie, has she beaten of more than she can chew? (2021

programme.title: Baked With A Kiss
programme.desc: (2022) Culinary romance starring Jonathan Stoddard and Ansley Gordon. Renowned for her magical True Love pie, a baker accidentally serves one to a rude customer, who ends up falling in love with her.

programme.title: Two Chefs and A Wedding Cake
programme.desc: (2022) Foodie fun romance. Sparks fly for a food critic at her sister's wedding when she clashes with a chef infamous for banning reviewers from his restaurant. Can they turn rivalry into romance?
